— Vgl. kara˚, mārivyasana˚, vajra˚.

3. vāraka 1〉 m.
a〉 ein best. Gang des Pferdes  MED. k. 131 .

— 2〉 n.
a〉 = kaṣṭasthāna  HĀR. 128 .
— b〉 ein best. wohlriechendes Gras  H. 1158 , v. l. für vālaka.  BRAHMAVAIV-P. 2,50 .

vāraka a. [vṛ-ṇic ṇvul]
(pb) Obstructing, opposing.
— kaḥ
1 A kind of horse.
2 A horse in general.
3 One of the paces of a horse.
— kaṃ
1 The seat of pain.
2 A kind of perfume (vāla or thīvera.)
